source: Learning Ansible with Rocky - Ansible Galaxy: The ansible-galaxy command and its subcommands

questions.q: What does the ansible-galaxy command manage, using galaxy.ansible.com?
questions.why: ansible-galaxy manages roles and collections from galaxy.ansible.com.

questions.q: Which ansible-galaxy role subcommand installs a role?
questions.why: ansible-galaxy role install <name> installs a role.

questions.q: Which subcommand generates a skeleton for a NEW role or collection?
Which subcommand displays the name and version of installed roles?
questions.why: list shows the installed roles' names and versions.

questions.q: Which role subcommand pulls a role from the galaxy web site and requires a login?
questions.why: import imports a role from the galaxy site and needs a login.

questions.q: Install the role alemorvan.patchmanagement with ansible-galaxy.
questions.why: ansible-galaxy role install <namespace.name> installs a role.

questions.q: Which subcommands exist for BOTH roles and collections in the guide's tables?
questions.why: Roles and collections both offer install, list, and init.
